summary: Two prior blockers are repaired, but embedded Gate DAG validation compares only overall_status and can accept stale noncritical gate status when current critical nodes differ.

findings.detail: Same-overall-status Gate DAGs with different required node identities and classifications are treated as consistent, allowing stale noncritical gate_status to authorize merge.
AC-8 lacks a same-overall-status/different-node DAG regression and execute-merge pre-GitHub rejection coverage.

judgment_delta: Prior block -> partial repair confirmed -> remains block because embedded DAG identity is not validated and tests miss the same-status/different-surface case.
